content:
The $17 AI Prompt System That Tripled My Interview RateMost people use AI completely wrong for job hunting.They open ChatGPT, type "write me a cover letter," and get something so generic it reads like every other application the hiring manager sees that day.
The problem isn't the AI. It's the prompt.
Specific prompts get specific, usable output. Here's the exact system I use.
## Why generic prompts fail
When you say "write me a cover letter for this job" the AI has no context. It writes something that could apply to anyone applying for anything.
The hiring manager reads 50 of these per day. Yours disappears.
## The 5-prompt framework
### Prompt 1: ATS Resume Optimizer
Most resumes never reach a human. Applicant Tracking Systems filter them out first by scanning for specific keywords.
Rewrite these resume bullet points to match the keywords in this job description. Keep the same facts, just optimize the language for ATS scanning. Job description: [paste full JD] My experience: [paste your bullet points] Output 5 rewritten bullet points.
### Prompt 2: Personalized Cover LetterWrite a cover letter for this job. Company: [name] Job description: [paste] My background: [2 sentences max] Open with their specific business challenge. Propose one concrete solution I can deliver. End with a clear next step. Max 200 words. No generic openers.
### Prompt 3: Interview Question PredictorBased on this job description, generate the 20 most likely interview questions for this specific role. For each question give me the ideal answer framework in 3 bullet points. Job description: [paste]
### Prompt 4: Salary Negotiation ScriptWrite a salary negotiation response. They offered: [amount] My target: [amount] Role: [title] Location: [city] My experience: [years] Write a confident but professional response that justifies my rate without being aggressive. Word for word script.
### Prompt 5: LinkedIn Headline OptimizerRewrite my LinkedIn headline to attract recruiters searching for [role] in [industry]. Current headline: [paste] Give me 5 options ranked by likely recruiter engagement. Explain why each works.
## The resultsBefore this system: 47 applications, 3 interviews.
After: 12 applications, 9 interviews.
Same experience. Same skills. Different presentation.
## Get the full system
I packaged 50+ prompts covering resume, cover letter, interview prep, negotiation, LinkedIn, and follow-ups:
👉 [Job Hunter's AI Cheat Code — $17](https://dexdropper.gumroad.com/l/insjmw)
One-time payment. Everything you need to land your next role.
